Description: Build an enterprise AI agent using Copilot Studio and Power Platform to automate vendor onboarding with document validation, risk scoring, and approvals. In this episode, Dharanidharan Balasubramaniam, shares a practical, architecture-focused walkthrough using AI Builder, Dataverse, and Power Automate. You’ll see how these components work together to design a scalable, enterprise-ready agent that reduces manual effort while maintaining governance and control.
Title: Building an Intelligent Vendor Onboarding Agent with Copilot Studio
Author: Microsoft Developer
